name: chart-line-interactive
visual_summary: A line chart with interactive elements, ideal for visualizing trends and patterns in data when a developer needs to showcase real-time updates and user engagement. Use cases include monitoring website traffic, displaying stock market prices, or illustrating user behavior. This component supports various line styles, animations, and zooming capabilities.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-interactive
Description: A line chart with interactive elements, ideal for visualizing trends and patterns in data when a developer needs to showcase real-time updates and user engagement. Use cases include monitoring website traffic, displaying stock market prices, or illustrating user behavior. This component supports various line styles, animations, and zooming capabilities.
Style: responsive, modern
Interactions: animated transitions, zooming, hover effects
Tags: line chart, interactive, real-time data, user engagement, data visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
